notes: Initial provisional ICD-10/keyword definitions for HIS Excel export. Please review with clinical/public-health team before official reporting.

Dengue.notes: ICD-10 A90* dengue fever and A91* dengue haemorrhagic fever.

AWD.notes: Provisional acute watery diarrhoea definition: A09* plus watery/loose stool terms in clinical text. This must be reviewed because A09 alone captures a much broader gastroenteritis group.

TB.notes: Strict active tuberculosis definition using ICD-10 A15-A19. Previous prototype numbers may have included sequelae or TB-associated codes; review if you need to match legacy totals.
